# Advanced Rowing Machine Tutorial Fixture

This fixture directory exists for the focused M1 validation command.
Invalid advanced-rowing contract cases are generated inside unittest-managed temporary repositories, because several of them are expected to fail validation. [Fixture][fixture-training]

## Fixture boundary

The passing fixture keeps the command target narrow and avoids scanning unrelated intentionally invalid fixture trees. [Fixture][fixture-setup]

## Sources

- [Fixture training][fixture-training]
- [Fixture setup][fixture-setup]
- [Fixture movement][fixture-movement]

[fixture-setup]: https://example.org/fixture-setup
[fixture-movement]: https://example.org/fixture-movement
